shared: # 请按仓库真实工具链增删。
# Review and trim to match the repo's real toolchain.

zh-cn.root_step_disabled: 根 shim 已禁用；从 {workflow_md_path} 与 {process_md_path} 开始
common_steps: 阅读 {process_md_path} 与 {workflow_md_path}
执行 git rev-parse --show-toplevel 与 git status --short
执行 {session_brief_ps1} 或 .sh
执行 {validate_ps1} -Strict 或 .sh --strict
用 {new_task_ps1} "任务标题" 创建 `tasks/active/` 下的父 task
当并行工作合理时，先用 {new_subtask_ps1} "parent task" "subtask 标题" 创建 subtask，再进入实现
已完成任务用 {archive_task_ps1} 归档到 `tasks/history/`
归档前，在 `docs/progress.md` 留下下一步入口、候选项和推荐项
完成任务后，按 workflow-config.env 的 TASK_COMPLETION_GIT_MODE 记录 Git handoff、未提交原因和推荐 commit message
full_profile_steps: 用 {new_backlog_item_ps1} 创建 backlog 条目，并用 {new_sprint_ps1} 启动 sprint
当需要发布节奏或自动化基线时，查看 {releases_dir} 与 {automation_dir}

en.root_step_disabled: Root shims are disabled; start from {workflow_md_path} and {process_md_path}
common_steps: Read {process_md_path} and {workflow_md_path}
Run git rev-parse --show-toplevel and git status --short
Run {session_brief_ps1} or .sh
Run {validate_ps1} -Strict or .sh --strict
Create a parent task card under tasks/active/ with {new_task_ps1} "Task title"
When parallel work is justified, create subtasks first with {new_subtask_ps1} "Parent task" "Subtask title" before implementation
Archive completed work into tasks/history/ with {archive_task_ps1}
Create an ADR with {new_adr_ps1} when the change introduces a durable technical choice
Use {handoff_ps1} before ending the session
Before archiving, leave a next-step entry, candidate options, and a recommendation in docs/progress.md
After completing a task, follow TASK_COMPLETION_GIT_MODE in workflow-config.env and record commit status, uncommitted reason, and recommended commit message
full_profile_steps: Use {new_backlog_item_ps1} for backlog intake and {new_sprint_ps1} to start a sprint
Use {releases_dir} and {automation_dir} when you need release rhythm or CI/CD scaffolding

generic: - lint：记录本仓库实际使用的 lint 命令
- typecheck：记录本仓库实际使用的静态分析或类型检查命令
- unit tests：记录最小且可靠的测试命令
- integration tests：记录最窄的端到端或场景验证命令
go: - lint：记录本仓库真实使用的 Go lint 命令（如果有）
- integration tests：记录最小可运行场景，或能证明 workflow 的 `go test` 包级命令
node: - integration tests：记录最小场景测试、应用 smoke test 或实际脚本命令
python: - lint：`ruff check .` 或本仓库真实使用的 lint 命令
- typecheck：`pyright` 或本仓库真实使用的类型检查命令
- integration tests：记录最小且能证明 workflow 的场景命令

generic: - lint: record the real lint command used in this repo
- typecheck: record the real static analysis or type command used in this repo
- unit tests: record the smallest reliable test command
- integration tests: record the narrowest end-to-end or scenario check
go: - lint: record the repo's real Go lint command, if any
- integration tests: record the smallest runnable scenario or `go test` package command that proves the workflow
node: - integration tests: record the narrowest scenario test, app smoke test, or script used in this repo
python: - lint: `ruff check .` or the repo's real lint command
- typecheck: `pyright` or the repo's real typecheck command
- integration tests: record the smallest scenario command that proves the workflow
